/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/ahfl-lsp.dir/main.cpp.o" -o ahfl-lsp  libahfl_tooling_lsp.a ../../compiler/semantics/libahfl_compiler_semantics.a ../formatter/libahfl_tooling_formatter.a ../../compiler/syntax/frontend/libahfl_compiler_syntax.a ../../base/json/libahfl_base_json.a ../../compiler/syntax/parser/libahfl_compiler_syntax_parser.a ../../../third_party/antlr4/libantlr4_runtime.a -framework CoreFoundation
